pkgmetadata.longdescription: WebKit-native ad + tracker + cookie-banner blocking for vimb and other WebKitGTK 6.0 applications on zentoo. Ships a small C compile binary (vimb-blocklist-compile) that populates a WebKitUserContentFilterStore from WKContentRuleList JSON, plus a weekly cron script that fetches EasyList, EasyPrivacy, and EasyList Cookie List, converts them to JSON via adblock-rust-cli, compiles them, and atomically swaps the store into place at /var/cache/vimb-blocklist/store/. Vimb reads from the shared store at startup.
